description:
Operating Area: Greece, Turkey

MAGIX is an ideal yacht for those who relish open-air living and stunning sea views, with alfresco dining options on both the main and upper deck, perfect for savoring meals with a backdrop of Greece’s captivating islands. The layout features two expansive cabins, each with the elegance and space to be considered a master suite, ensuring every guest experiences ultimate comfort and luxury. The sun deck serves as a social hub, complete with a freestanding bar for refreshing cocktails and a jacuzzi for serene relaxation. Sun loungers, comfortable seating, and casual dining options make this versatile space perfect for lounging by day or enjoying the evening ambiance.

crew.name: Theodore Mais
crew.bio: Captain Theodore is a graduate of the Greek merchant Marine Academy holding a Master Mariner diploma. He has worked on both sailing and motor yachts across the globe. Following his military service, he began his career in the yachting industry in 1990. He has the knowledge and experience to offer a safe and enjoyable cruise in the seas of the Eastern Mediterranean.  Cpt Theodore is an efficient leader and excellent communicator with over 30 years of experience at sea. Whether guiding guests through the vibrant blue waters of the Cyclades or the serene shores of the Ionian islands, Captain Theodore brings a personal touch to every journey, offering insights into Greece’s rich history and traditions.

crew.name: Kostas Martis
crew.bio: Chef Kostas is a highly experienced culinary professional with over 22 years in the hotel and restaurant industry, including 7 years in the yachting and cruise sector. He excels in menu creation and food preparation, while maintaining strong relationships with guests. Known for his friendly personality, excellent communication skills, and strong teamwork, he consistently delivers top-quality cuisine and memorable guest experiences.

crew.name: Anna Amelina
crew.bio: Anna is a dedicated Chief Stewardess with a strong background in yachting sector and hospitality. She brings refined silver-service skills and a natural ability to create a warm, inviting atmosphere on board. Her reliability, attention to detail, and uplifting personality ensure smooth service throughout every charter, while her genuine love for guest interaction allows her to create unique and memorable experiences for everyone on board.

crew.name: Smaragda Prenta
crew.bio: Smaragda began her yachting career in 2022 and quickly found her dream job, cruising the Eastern Mediterranean. She provides top-notch service with attention to detail. Having a vibrant personality and excellent communication skills, Smaragda guarantees a memorable and enjoyable experience for all guests on board.

crew.name: Fotis Vlastos
crew.bio: Fotis is a graduate of the National Merchant Marine Academy and holds an Engineer Class A’ Diploma. He has a 25-year experience on different type of vessels and luxury motor yachts. He is also a holder of all necessary safety certificates. Fotis ensures the yacht runs smoothly and efficiently, handling everything from routine maintenance to complex systems. His calm and focused approach to problem-solving, combined with a strong passion for the sea, guarantees that guests enjoy a safe and seamless experience.

crew.name: Nikos Varvaresos
crew.bio: Nikos is a hardworking, resourceful and motivated person. He has all his seaman’s qualifications,  as well as a technical background in engineering. Nikos is assigned to the water toys and will patiently assist his guests in every way possible with a willing and friendly attitude.

crew.name: Aris Vrachalis
crew.bio: Aris is a reliable and motivated deckhand with several seasons of experience on both private and charter yachts. He brings strong teamwork, professionalism, and customer-focused services. Certified with A+B category and speedboat operator licenses, a sailor’s license, he contributes to safe, efficient, and professional deck operations with enthusiasm and dedication.
